checks.evidence: sandbox.enabled: true; deny and ask lists present; network and filesystem allowlists configured
PreToolUse Bash → sandbox-bypass-warn.sh; PostToolUse Bash → sandbox-error-hint.sh; statusLine → sandbox-status-line.sh
sandbox-bypass-warn.sh ✓ executable, sandbox-error-hint.sh ✓ executable, sandbox-status-line.sh ✓ executable
claude-code 2.1.150 installed, at or above min_version floor 2.1.150
cat ~/.aws/credentials → Operation not permitted; $AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID empty; curl denied at permission layer
/home/alice/myrepo in allowRead and allowWrite in .claude/settings.local.json; live read of .git/HEAD OK; write probe OK
